lessons.name: Unit 12: Life on Other Planets
lessons.description: Learn about life on other planets with reported speech (questions).

sections.heading: 1. Từ vựng (Vocabulary)
sections.content:
Space: planet, star, moon, galaxy, universe, solar system, asteroid, comet, meteor

Space exploration: astronaut, spaceship, rocket, space station, satellite, telescope, UFO, alien

Planets: Mercury, Venus, Earth, Mars, Jupiter, Saturn, Uranus, Neptune

sections.heading: 2-12. Các phần còn lại
sections.content: Luyện tập từ vựng, Ngữ âm, Ngữ pháp, Getting Started, A Closer Look 1-2, Communication, Skills 1-2, Looking Back, Project

sections.heading: 3. Ngữ pháp (Grammar)
sections.content:
Reported Speech - Questions (Câu tường thuật - Câu hỏi)

A. Yes/No Questions:

  • Cấu trúc: S + asked (+ O) + if/whether + S + V (lùi thì)
  • Ex: "Do you like space?" → He asked me if/whether I liked space.
  • Ex: "Are you an astronaut?" → She asked him if/whether he was an astronaut.

B. Wh-questions:

  • Cấu trúc: S + asked (+ O) + Wh-word + S + V (lùi thì)
  • Ex: "Where do you live?" → He asked me where I lived.
  • Ex: "What are you doing?" → She asked him what he was doing.

C. Lưu ý quan trọng:

  • Không đảo trợ động từ trong câu tường thuật
  • Direct: "Where do you live?"
  • Reported: He asked where I lived. (không phải "where did I live")
  • Lùi thì như câu trần thuật
  • Do/Does → V (past simple)
  • Did → had + V3
  • Will → would
  • Can → could

D. Thay đổi đại từ và trạng từ:

  • you → I/he/she (tùy ngữ cảnh)
  • your → my/his/her
  • here → there
  • now → then
  • today → that day

problemTypes.name: Dạng 1: Yes/No Questions
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • S + asked (+ O) + if/whether + S + V (lùi thì)
  • Không đảo trợ động từ
  • Lùi thì

examples.question: "Do you like space?" → He asked me ______.
examples.solution: He asked me if/whether I liked space.
examples.explanation: Do you like → if/whether I liked (lùi thì, không đảo)

examples.question: "Are you an astronaut?" → She asked him ______.
examples.solution: She asked him if/whether he was an astronaut.

examples.question: "Can you see the stars?" → He asked me ______.
examples.solution: He asked me if/whether I could see the stars.
examples.explanation: Can you → if/whether I could (can → could)

problemTypes.name: Dạng 2: Wh-questions
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • S + asked (+ O) + Wh-word + S + V (lùi thì)
  • Giữ nguyên từ để hỏi
  • Không đảo trợ động từ

examples.question: "Where do you live?" → He asked me ______.
examples.explanation: Where do you live → where I lived (không đảo)

examples.question: "What are you doing?" → She asked him ______.
examples.solution: She asked him what he was doing.
examples.explanation: What are you doing → what he was doing

examples.question: "When will you go?" → He asked me ______.
examples.solution: He asked me when I would go.
examples.explanation: When will you → when I would (will → would)

problemTypes.name: Dạng 3: Lùi thì với Did
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • Did + V → had + V3
  • Áp dụng cho cả Yes/No và Wh-questions

examples.question: "Did you see the UFO?" → He asked me ______.
examples.solution: He asked me if/whether I had seen the UFO.
examples.explanation: Did you see → if/whether I had seen

examples.question: "Where did you go?" → She asked him ______.
examples.solution: She asked him where he had gone.
examples.explanation: Where did you go → where he had gone

examples.question: "What did you find?" → He asked me ______.
examples.solution: He asked me what I had found.
examples.explanation: What did you find → what I had found

problemTypes.name: Dạng 4: Thay đổi đại từ và trạng từ
problemTypes.method:
Phương pháp:

  • you → I/he/she
  • your → my/his/her
  • here → there
  • now → then

examples.question: "Are you here now?" → He asked me ______.
examples.solution: He asked me if/whether I was there then.
examples.explanation: you → I; here → there; now → then

examples.question: "Where is your spaceship?" → She asked him ______.
examples.solution: She asked him where his spaceship was.
examples.explanation: your → his; is your → his was (đảo lại thứ tự)

examples.question: "What are you doing here?" → He asked me ______.
examples.solution: He asked me what I was doing there.

exercises.question: "Do you like space?" → He asked me ______ I liked space.
exercises.explanation: Yes/No question → if/whether

exercises.question: "Where do you live?" → He asked me where I ______.
exercises.explanation: do you live → I lived (lùi thì)

exercises.question: "Are you an astronaut?" → She asked him ______ he was an astronaut.
exercises.explanation: Yes/No question → if/whether

exercises.question: "What are you doing?" → She asked him what he ______.
exercises.explanation: are you doing → he was doing

exercises.question: "Can you see the stars?" → He asked me ______ I could see the stars.
exercises.explanation: Can you → if/whether I could

exercises.question: "When will you go?" → He asked me when I ______ go.
exercises.explanation: will you → I would (will → would)

exercises.question: "Did you see the UFO?" → He asked me if I ______ the UFO.
exercises.explanation: Did you see → I had seen

exercises.question: "Where did you go?" → She asked him where he ______.
exercises.explanation: did you go → he had gone

exercises.question: "Are you here now?" → He asked me if I was ______ ______.
exercises.explanation: here → there; now → then

exercises.question: "Where is your spaceship?" → She asked him where ______ spaceship was.
exercises.explanation: your → his (he)

exercises.question: Which are correct reported questions? (Select all that apply)
options: He asked if I liked space.
She asked where did I live.
He asked what I was doing.
She asked if could I help.
exercises.explanation: Đúng: if I liked, what I was doing. Sai: where did I live (không đảo), if could I (sai thứ tự)

exercises.question: Which words can introduce Yes/No reported questions? (Select all that apply)
exercises.explanation: Yes/No questions dùng if hoặc whether. 'that' cho statements, 'what' cho Wh-questions.

exercises.question: Which transformations are correct? (Select all that apply)
options: "Can you help?" → if I could help
"Where do you live?" → where I lived
"Did you go?" → if I had gone
"Are you here?" → if I am here
exercises.explanation: Đúng: could help, I lived, had gone. Sai: if I am here (phải là 'was there')

exercises.question: Transform: "Do you like space?" → He asked me ______.
exercises.answer: if/whether I liked space / if I liked space / whether I liked space
exercises.explanation: Do you like → if/whether I liked

exercises.question: Transform: "Where do you live?" → He asked me ______.
exercises.explanation: Where do you live → where I lived (không đảo)

exercises.question: Transform: "Did you see the UFO?" → He asked me ______.
exercises.answer: if/whether I had seen the UFO / if I had seen the UFO / whether I had seen the UFO
exercises.explanation: Did you see → if/whether I had seen

exercises.question: Transform: "Are you here now?" → He asked me ______.
exercises.answer: if/whether I was there then / if I was there then / whether I was there then
exercises.explanation: Are you here now → if/whether I was there then

exercises.question: Transform to reported questions: "Do you believe in aliens?" + "Where do they live?" (He asked me...)
exercises.sample_answer: He asked me if/whether I believed in aliens. He asked me where they lived.
exercises.explanation: Yes/No → if/whether; Wh-question → where + S + V (lùi thì)

exercises.question: Transform to reported questions: "Can you see the stars?" + "What are you looking at?" (She asked him...)
exercises.sample_answer: She asked him if/whether he could see the stars. She asked him what he was looking at.
exercises.explanation: Can you → if/whether he could; What are you → what he was

exercises.question: Rearrange: asked / He / me / if / liked / I / space / . / asked / She / where / lived / I / .
exercises.sample_answer: He asked me if I liked space. She asked where I lived.
exercises.explanation: Sắp xếp: asked + if/whether + S + V; asked + Wh-word + S + V

exercises.question: Transform: "Did you visit Mars?" + "How did you get there?" (He asked me...)
exercises.sample_answer: He asked me if/whether I had visited Mars. He asked me how I had got/gotten there.
exercises.explanation: Did you visit → if/whether I had visited; How did you get → how I had got (here → there)

exercises.question: Transform and combine: "Are you an astronaut?" + "Where is your spaceship?" + "When will you leave?" (She asked him... Use reported questions)
exercises.sample_answer: She asked him if/whether he was an astronaut, where his spaceship was, and when he would leave.
exercises.explanation: Kết hợp 3 câu hỏi: if/whether he was, where his was (đảo), when he would (will → would)
